title: Jotform integration as update to existing items
excerpt: I am looking to link a jotform that we use and have it connect and write an update to a specific item. I don’t see how i can connect Jotform to match a Jotform field to Monday field to know where to map the update. Anyon…

posts.author: deena (deenateichman)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking to link a jotform that we use and have it connect and write an update to a specific item. I don’t see how i can connect Jotform to match a Jotform field to Monday field to know where to map the update. Anyone have a clue?
